ogTitle: Murray Gorge vs Murrays Beach: Climate Safety

heading: Murray Gorge vs Murrays Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murray Gorge, New South Wales and Murrays Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murray Gorge has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Murrays Beach (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murray Gorge or Murrays Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murray Gorge has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Murrays Beach scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murray Gorge scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Murrays Beach scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murray Gorge or Murrays Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murray Gorge has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
